DIVIDER = ","
DATABASE_TYPE = "oracle"
PREFIX_FOR_OUTPUT = false
EXTRA_OUTPUT_FILES = false

content:
MAX_DICT_SQL_STRING = 1000000
MAX_CLOB_STRING = 3000
DICT_COMMON_KEY = "SDB_VALUE"
DROP_VIEW = true
SQL_INSERT_BATCH_SIZE = 1000
PSE_WITHOUT_SEQUENCES = true
META_TRANSFORM_EXTENDED_COLUMN_LIST = "LIST_VALUES, REFERENTIAL_ENTITY, REFERENTIAL_CLAUSE"
TIMESTAMP_MASK = "DD-MM-YYYY HH24.MI.SS"

# Default
[oracle]
MAX_DB_OBJECT_NAME = 128
DEFAULT_DATATYPE = "VARCHAR2(200)"
NUMERIC_DATATYPE = "NUMBER"
VARCHAR_DATATYPE = "VARCHAR2"
PLSQL_DELIMITER = "/"
REPORT_ABS_VALUE = false
GATHER_BULK_DROP_AND_CREATE_VIEWS = false

# Set Environment Variable: D2C_DATABASE_TYPE = postgres
[postgres]
MAX_DB_OBJECT_NAME = 63
DEFAULT_DATATYPE = "VARCHAR(200)"
NUMERIC_DATATYPE = "NUMERIC"
VARCHAR_DATATYPE = "VARCHAR"
PLSQL_DELIMITER = ";"
TEXT_DATATYPES_LIST = "CHARACTER VARYING,VARCHAR,CHARACTER,CHAR,TEXT"
